t-1.notes: feature: board config block · Board @ internal/project/project.go · dedicated [board] struct (provider/base_url/auth_env/project/enabled/milestone_mode/state_map) + board.* dotted get/set arms, decoupled from [remote]

t-10.notes: feature: milestone backlog sync · syncBacklog + YouTrackClient.CreateBacklogItem @ internal/cmd/issue.go,internal/forge/youtrack.go · mirrors unscaffolded slugs + someday ideas as Open issues attached to the milestone entity (Fix versions), idempotent via board.json backlog map

t-2.notes: feature: youtrack board backend · YouTrackClient @ internal/forge/youtrack.go · YouTrack REST CRUD (bearer perm-token, readable-id PROJ-7 addressing, ?fields projection) behind BoardClient interface + NewYouTrack factory

t-3.notes: feature: inbox board triage · inbox.md §0 gate · inbound board source gated on [board].enabled instead of remote.board_sync, decoupling triage from the code host

t-4.notes: feature: board config block · doctor Board section @ internal/cmd/doctor.go · validates a configured [board] (provider/auth_env/base_url/milestone_mode) independently of [remote], ✗ per problem + ✓ when well-formed

t-5.notes: feature: board link registry · board.Board + openBoard @ internal/board/board.go,internal/cmd/issue.go · string readable-id keys across phases/quicks/milestones/dismissed; board ops resolve solely from [board] via forge.NewBoard, BoardClient unifies forge+youtrack

t-6.notes: feature: youtrack milestone entity · EnsureMilestoneEntity @ internal/forge/youtrack.go · one dispatch over version (Version bundle value) / agile (existing board, warn-skip) / epic (create-or-reuse Epic issue), idempotent

t-7.notes: feature: youtrack state sync · YouTrackClient.SetState @ internal/forge/youtrack.go · maps dross lifecycle→State custom field (default map + [board].state_map override), unmapped state warns+skips without failing the sync

t-8.notes: feature: inbox board triage · TestIssuePullYouTrackFiltersLinkedAndDismissed @ internal/cmd/issue_test.go · pins that issue pull surfaces open unlinked/undismissed YouTrack issues with label→tag query passthrough (generic path from t-2/t-5)

t-9.notes: feature: youtrack phase tracking · ensureMilestoneLink dispatch @ internal/cmd/issue.go · milestone-sync ensures the entity per milestone_mode and links it; phase-sync creates/updates the YouTrack issue (criteria+checklist, State) by readable id, idempotent
